author: y4rr
content: sanitize_path_component in ferrotorch-hub/src/download.rs is pub(crate). The conformance suite (integration test) cannot call it directly; the 20 accept/reject cases from the fixture are tested indirectly via HubCache::store (which calls validate_cache_relative) rather than the sanitizer itself. The full unit-level coverage of all 20 cases (colon rejection, overlong string, dotfile, backslash, etc.) lives only in the same-file #[cfg(test)] module. To fix: either promote sanitize_path_component to pub (with a stability note) or add a thin pub conformance-test shim gated on #[cfg(test)], so the integration conformance test can assert all 20 fixture cases directly. Exclusion filed in _surface_exclusions.toml with tracking_issue = #840.
